mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_auth_permission (name, parent_id, order_num, type, menu_url, component, status, show, icon, permission_key, is_deleted, created_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{type}, #{menuUrl}, #{component}, #{status}, #{show}, #{icon}, #{permissionKey}, #{isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_auth_permission SET name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, type = #{type}, menu_url = #{menuUrl}, component = #{component}, status = #{status}, show = #{show}, icon = #{icon}, permission_key = #{permissionKey}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_auth_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_auth_permission WHERE permission_key = #{permissionKey} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_auth_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY permission_key ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_auth_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY permission_key ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_auth_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0
